programme.desc: Owen leads a lonely life and is bullied by his peers at school. He happily befriends Abby, his new helpful neighbour, without being aware that she is hiding a secret from him.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: Megan Walsh, a special agent, is curious about teenage life experiences so she fakes her own death and enrols in high school. Soon, she realises the troubles of high school life.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After putting an end to the dystopian Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen and her friends attempt to rescue a brainwashed companion and free their nation from the control of President Coriolanus Snow.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: Nolan Hayes faces challenges to keep Abigail, his newborn daughter who is on a ventilator, alive when Hurricane Katrina impacts the functionality and electricity of the hospital.
King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fight against Xerxes and his massive Persian army in the battle of Thermopylae. They face insurmountable odds when they are betrayed by a Spartan reject.

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: New power dynamics emerge amongst the survivors of the second ice age when they board a train travelling across the globe.

programme.title: Rocky III
programme.desc: Rocky, the reigning world champion, accepts a boxing challenge from Clubber Lang and loses the match. He also ends up losing his credibility as a champion, and has to fight to get it back.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: The Decepticons are trying to learn the secrets of a stranded Cybertronian spacecraft. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must stop them before it is too late.

programme.title: 99 Cahaya Di Langit Eropa (The Final Edition)
Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Cewek Ke-33 Makin Bikin Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Aulia was fired again for fighting with the elderly woman she was caring for, which had happened 33 times. Although Kiki was annoyed, her manager still employed Aulia because of her childhood friendship with Kiki. Aulia was then given one last chance to care for Marco, a famous photographer who had just recovered from an accident.

programme.title: Abang Layang Layang Gamonin Ayang
programme.desc: The endless quarrel between Hardi Fadillah and Josephine Firmstone seems like it will never end. Hardi, who loves chasing broken kites, is always blocked by Josephine, the kite seller.

programme.title: Trio Gabut Kursus Iman (Spesial Ramadan)

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: JOZAN
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Puncline DAC
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Kiah The Spy

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi

programme.title: Bujang 40
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau

programme.title: Motif Sosial?

programme.title: AIRA EPS 3

Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: Rick, a fading actor, and Cliff, his stunt double, struggle to find relevant work in Hollywood and go through various twists and turns in order to restart their careers.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Howard Hughes, a germaphobic inventor with mental illness, creates a new plane. Despite personal struggles, he also becomes a successful filmmaker, balancing aviation and Hollywood pursuits.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich lands a job as a legal assistant at Ed Masry's law firm. Here, she builds a case against a power company after she learns that they have been polluting a town's water supply.

programme.title: The Family Fang
programme.desc: After the police inform them about their parents' mysterious disappearance, two siblings embark on a mission to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Great Gatsby

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: An Alaska State Trooper partners with a young woman who escaped the clutches of serial killer Robert Hansen to bring the murderer to justice. Based on actual events.

programme.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
programme.desc: Tired of Chris's professional failures, his wife decides to separate, leaving him financially broke with an unpaid internship in a brokerage firm and his son's custody to deal with.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Luqman bersetuju jika Aniq menjadi pengganti Tuan Budi, tetapi meletakkan satu syarat yang mungkin akan membongkar rahsia Aniq. Nadia rasa Benjamin perlu memihak kepada Aniq.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang 3 remaja wanita dari latarbelakang keluarga yang berbeza mengejar gelaran Ratu Tenpin Negara.

programme.title: Bunga Hati
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Lara Perindu
programme.desc: Firasat ingin tahu seorang anak akhirnya membawanya ke sebuah perkampungan nelayan dimana dia mempelajari kisah percintaan ibubapanya dahulu. Adakah dia akhirnya berjaya menemui bapanya?.

programme.title: Pernikahan Palsu
programme.desc: Sehari sebelum hari perkahwinannya dengan Aji, Nila mengalami kemalangan dan hilang penglihatan. Aji membatalkan perkahwinan itu. Galang yang tidak sanggup melihat Nila, terdesak untuk melamar Nila.

programme.title: Harta Dalam Stor
programme.desc: Ikuti hos Nabil Mahir dan Azhar Sulaiman menerjah stor kediaman selebriti tanahair untuk mencari barang-barang yang boleh digunapakai dan dijual.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Casa Liburan
programme.desc: Pengacara akan membawa penonton meneroka rumah-rumah mewah yang unik dan menarik milik hartawan di Malaysia.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Cuti
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Luqman bersetuju jika Aniq menjadi pengganti Tuan Budi, tetapi meletakkan satu syarat yang mungkin akan membongkar rahsia Aniq. Nadia rasa Benjamin perlu memihak kepada Aniq.

programme.title: First Wives
programme.desc: Rancangan Diyana dan Michelle terbantut apabila mereka ditangkap semasa rompakan dan terpaksa menambah penculikan ke dalam senarai jenayah mereka.

programme.title: Di Balik Idola
programme.desc: Program bual bicara menggunakan konsep terbuka membariskan penyanyi dan pelakon. Berkongsi pengalaman dan cerita yang belum pernah diketahui oleh masyarakat.

programme.title: Chef Terjun
programme.desc: Hos Akhmal Nazri memberanikan diri untuk keluar dari zon selesanya dan menyahut cabaran untuk menjadi tukang masak untuk satu hari di tempat-tempat makan yang terkenal di Malaysia.

programme.title: Teroka Lokal
programme.desc: Teroka Lokal adalah program travelog dengan hos selebriti yang akan mengembara untuk mencari tempat-tempat tersembunyi yang menarik di Malaysia.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show
programme.desc: Pelbagai permainan yang menyeronokkan & menarik yang dibuat untuk pasangan selebriti yang sudah berkahwin, tindakan dan jawapan mereka yang tidak dapat diramalkan melalui kuiz dan permainan fizikal.

programme.title: Solo Yolo : Checklist
programme.desc: Mampukah selebriti-selebriti ini melakukan cabaran yang diberikan kepada mereka mengikut bajet yang telah ditetapkan.

programme.title: Rasa Nostalgia Ramadan 3
programme.desc: Menyajikan hidangan istimewa dari nenek moyang mereka dan membincangkan makanan nostalgia ketika menjelang Ramadan

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Qistina dimarahi oleh Herni kerana lewat pulang. Herni mengingatkan Qistina bahawa status keluarga mereka dan keluarga Luqman adalah sangat berbeza.

programme.title: Luahan Selebriti
programme.desc: Memberi peluang kepada selebriti yang mengalami perubahan - secara rohani & emosi untuk menangani dan menjelaskan beberapa isu dan kisah kontroversi mereka yang lalu.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Action!
programme.desc: Meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal.

programme.title: 1-TO-11
programme.desc: Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England. Drawing on his experiences at Anfield and on the international stage, Garcia reflects on the talent, skill, and personalities that made his list. With insight, anecdotes and tough decisions, he builds his dream team from his unforgettable years in the Prem

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW
programme.desc: We look back at all the very best moments of the 2025/2026 season so far. An action-packed show filled with exciting Premier League programming and digital content.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: This week, Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch catches up with Owen Hargreaves for the Big Interview. In this in-depth conversation the pair discuss football, identity and the craft of playing in the middle of the park. The Premier League winner opens up about his early life in the Netherlands, the people in his life that have inspired him on and off the pitch, and gives us a tactical deep dive into his

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. We explore the past, present and future of officiating, spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Whether it was for club or country, Stuart Pearce was one of English football's greatest servants, with a reputation as a fiercely uncompromising defender. Pearce looks back at some of the highs and lows of a playing career that took him from Nottingham Forest to Newcastle, West Ham, and Manchester City, who he would then go on to manage in memorable fashion.

programme.title: REVIEW - THU 06 MAR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: A-X-L
programme.desc: Miles befriends A-X-L, a robotic dog, when he manages to activate its owner-pairing technology. However, Miles's life takes an unusual turn when A-X-L's creators come searching for it.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie, a journalist, is determined to expose the Life Foundation, for performing unethical experiments on humans. During his investigation, a symbiotic alien merges with him, ensuing chaos.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two undercover agents, Robert and Michael, aim to expose Manny 'Papi' Greco, a drug lord. Unaware of each other's true identities, the two get into trouble when they finally meet Papi.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: A hard-living superhero who has fallen out of favor with the public enters into a questionable relationship with the wife of the public relations professional who's trying to repair his image.
Jackson Curtis, a discontented writer, battles against all odds to keep his family secure when a series of apocalyptic calamities threaten to decimate humankind.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

programme.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
programme.desc: The Mitchells, a dysfunctional family, must fight a robot apocalypse amidst their much-awaited road trip to save humanity.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: After Spencer goes missing, his team of confidantes comes back to Jumanji to go to the undiscovered regions and support him in escaping the world's most lethal game.

programme.title: Fight For Love
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ching-chi abruptly has chest pain. After receiving treatment, Ching-chi insists on working while keeping Kam-kuk in the dark. Ka-chun is worried. Wai-man offers complimentary treatment to a poorly kid called Little Him and Him’s mother. Shuk-foon approaches some lawyer as she arranges for Yam-yuen’s shares to be transferred to Wai-man.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Best Thing
programme.desc: The gentle doctor He Suye and the severely insomniac hotel manager Shen Xifan, who repeatedly cross paths during daily life, gradually develop feelings for each other. In the end, they heal one another and embrace a love story filled with the fragrance of herbal medicine.
